channel.title: DevOps on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Essential CLI Tools You Should Know - Part 5: bottom & bat
item.description: Explore bottom, a better htop, and bat, a modern cat replacement to improve your Linux workflow.

item.title: Essential CLI Tools You Should Know - Part 2: zoxide & ouch
item.description: Explore zoxide, a better cd, and ouch, a modern tar replacement to improve your Linux workflow.

item.title: Essential CLI Tools You Should Know - Part 1: dust & lsd
item.description: Explore dust, a better du, and lsd, a modern ls replacement to improve your Linux workflow.
